news_items.headline: Blue Jays Draft Recap: Day 2
news_items.summary: The second 80% of the 2026 MLB amateur draft occurred yesterday afternoon. The Blue Jays made 16 additional picks following the three they had yesterday. The theme today was cutting deals. The Jays will likely need to come up with extra money to pay Cole Carlon and Will Brick, both of whom were generally expected […]

news_items.headline: Mets stumble into All-Star break after disastrous ending against Red Sox closes out 'unacceptable' first half
news_items.summary: The Mets were three outs away on Sunday from salvaging the finale of their three-game series with the Boston Red Sox and entering the All-Star break on a rare high note, but even small wins are hard to come by for New York this season and they blew it in the final two innings.

news_items.headline: Andy Green backs Devin Williams as Mets closer in second half despite up-and-down season
news_items.summary: Devin Williams’ blown save Sunday wasn’t as much on the closer as it was on Francisco Lindor’s ninth-inning error, but Williams was hardly blameless.

news_items.headline: White Sox Minor League Update: July 12, 2026
news_items.summary: Wins from Charlotte and Winston-Salem balanced out the South Side organization, as the Ballers and Barons both took an L

news_items.headline: Yankees prospect Ben Grable has no major leaguer like him thanks to dynamic fastball
news_items.summary: Grable said he is averaging 96.1 mph with his four-seamer and about 20.5 to 21 inches of induced vertical break — essentially the movement generated from how the ball spins.
